field_values.action_summary: After a night's rest, Dorothy continues her journey. Boq offers a warning about the dangers ahead. While resting near a cornfield, Dorothy encounters a Scarecrow perched on a pole who suddenly comes to life.
field_values.emotional_beat: From cautious optimism to sudden shock/surprise.
field_values.camera_intent: Low angle looking up at the scarecrow on the pole; Close-ups of straw movement during awakening; Wide shots emphasizing cornfield isolation
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Dorothy's level of fatigue and dishevelment post-travel
Physical positioning of the_scarecrow on the pole
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH003_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from Munchkin safety to road uncertainty through a character encounter that shifts from travel fatigue to sudden shock. The sequence must emphasize the isolation of the cornfield and the physical transformation of the scarecrow from an object to a living entity.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (weary traveler, white dress/clothing)
- boq (brief appearance)
- the_scarecrow (perched on pole)

## Required Environments
- yellow_brick_road
- cornfield_scarecrow_post

## Continuity Constraints
- Dorothy's level of fatigue and dishevelment post-travel
- Physical positioning of the_scarecrow on the pole

## Beat List
- BT001: Dorothy travels the road and receives a warning from Boq.
- BT002: Dorothy rests near the cornfield edge.
- BT003: The Scarecrow comes to life.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
